form.formComment: Second-up here following a spell. Solid effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr8) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 5th-9.78 beaten 5 m by Last Clansman (1:58.50) in NR up to 54 on April 7 at $4.60. Fitter so another big run is on the cards.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr4) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 10th-18.25 beaten 15 m by Alpha Stride (1:55.50) in NR up to 72 on March 31 at $26. At the run before 7th (Fr1) over 1609m at this track was 4th-9.1 at the bell, beaten 11 m by I Am Hellbound (1:55.00) in NR up to 68 on March 17 at $81. One of the exotic players on his best form.

form.formComment: Resuming after four-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into fourth after showing early speed, behind Oria at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 66 on December 1 at $2.20. Readied with two trials but might still need this.

form.formComment: In good form recently. Last start won by 2 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr8) at this track (1:56.30) beating What The Tooth in 3yo No NR on April 7 at $3.20 at the bell was 2nd-17.02. Cops a 30m handicap but should be improved and is talented.

form.formComment: Good performance when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Alpha Stride at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 72 on March 31 at $17. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.5 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Chief Runningcloud at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 68 on April 7 at $11. Building in fitness and looks close to a win.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he then settled down to finish fourth over 2138m at Albion Park last start. Gives away 40m at the handicap but ended last campaign with back-to-back Group 1 fourths so is capable.
